member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SourceGenerators.WsdlClientSourceGenerator
member.summary: Roslyn incremental source generator that translates WSDL files into C# proxy clients at compile time.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SourceGenerators.WsdlClientSourceGenerator.Initialize(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IncrementalGeneratorInitializationContext)
member.summary: Initializes the generator pipeline.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException
member.summary: Base exception for all SmartWsdlKit related errors.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and a reference to the inner exception that is the cause of this exception.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a SOAP service returns a SOAP Fault.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultCode
member.summary: Gets the fault code (e.g., soap:Client, soap:Server, or Soap 1.2 codes like Value, Receiver).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultString
member.summary: Gets the fault string/reason describing the error.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.FaultActor
member.summary: Gets the actor/role that caused the fault.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.DetailXml
member.summary: Gets the detailed XML string of the fault, if provided.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapFaultException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException
member.summary: Exception thrown when parsing of WSDL fails.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParseException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException
member.summary: Exception thrown when XML Schema validation fails.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SchemaValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specified error message and inner exception.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument
member.summary: Represents a parsed WSDL definition document supporting both WSDL 1.1 and 2.0.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.TargetNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the WSDL document.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Services
member.summary: Gets the services exposed by this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Bindings
member.summary: Gets the bindings defined in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Interfaces
member.summary: Gets the interfaces (portTypes in WSDL 1.1) defined in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Operations
member.summary: Gets all operations across all interfaces.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Schemas
member.summary: Gets the compiled XML Schema set containing all types defined or imported in this WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Imports
member.summary: Gets the list of raw imported documents (WSDLs/XSDs) resolved during loading.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a WSDL document from a URI (file or HTTP/HTTPS).

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a WSDL document asynchronously from a URI.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService
member.summary: Represents a service in the WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the service.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Documentation
member.summary: Gets the documentation, if any.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlService.Endpoints
member.summary: Gets the endpoints (ports) associated with this service.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint
member.summary: Represents an endpoint (port in WSDL 1.1, endpoint in WSDL 2.0).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the endpoint.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Binding
member.summary: Gets the binding associated with this endpoint.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlEndpoint.Address
member.summary: Gets the address location URL.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding
member.summary: Represents a binding in the WSDL.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the binding.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Interface
member.summary: Gets the associated interface (portType in WSDL 1.1).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Transport
member.summary: Gets the transport protocol URI (e.g. http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.SoapVersion
member.summary: Gets the SOAP version of this binding.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Style
member.summary: Gets the binding style ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBinding.Operations
member.summary: Gets operation-specific binding details.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation
member.summary: Represents binding-specific details for an operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.Name
member.summary: Gets the operation name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.SoapAction
member.summary: Gets the SOAP action URI.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlBindingOperation.Style
member.summary: Gets the soap:body binding style override ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface
member.summary: Represents an interface (portType in WSDL 1.1, interface in WSDL 2.0).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the interface.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlInterface.Operations
member.summary: Gets the list of operations exposed by this interface.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation
member.summary: Represents a single service operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Interface
member.summary: Gets the associated WsdlInterface.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputMessageName
member.summary: Gets the input message name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputElementName
member.summary: Gets the input element local XML name defined in XSD schemas.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.InputElementNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the input XML element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputMessageName
member.summary: Gets the output message name.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputElementName
member.summary: Gets the output element local XML name defined in XSD schemas.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.OutputElementNamespace
member.summary: Gets the target namespace of the output XML element.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.SoapAction
member.summary: Gets the soapAction associated with this operation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlOperation.Style
member.summary: Gets the style of the operation ("document" or "rpc").

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion
member.summary: Supported SOAP protocol versions.

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Soap11
member.summary: SOAP 1.1 Protocol (http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/)

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Soap12
member.summary: SOAP 1.2 Protocol (http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope)

member.name: F:SmartWsdlKit.SoapVersion.Http
member.summary: Non-SOAP HTTP binding.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser
member.summary: Parses WSDL 1.1 and 2.0 documents into a WsdlDocument structure.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads and parses a WSDL document from a URI.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlParser.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads and parses a WSDL document asynchronously from a URI.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for code generation.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.Namespace
member.summary: Gets or sets the target namespace of the generated classes. Default is "SmartWsdlKit.Generated".

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.GenerateRecords
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to generate C# 9.0 Records instead of standard POCO classes. Default is false.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions.EnableNullableReferenceTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to make reference types nullable (C# Nullable Reference Types). Default is true.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator
member.summary: Generates C# DTOs, interfaces, and clients from a WsdlDocument.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator.Generate(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument)
member.summary: Generates C# source code from WSDL metadata using default options.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.WsdlCodeGenerator.Generate(SmartWsdlKit.WsdlDocument,SmartWsdlKit.CodeGeneratorOptions)
member.summary: Generates C# source code from WSDL metadata with specified options.

member.name: T:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment
member.summary: Represents an attachment for SOAP requests (MTOM or SOAP with Attachments).

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.ContentId
member.summary: Gets the unique Content-ID of the attachment.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.ContentType
member.summary: Gets the MIME content type of the attachment (e.g. "application/octet-stream" or "image/png").

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.Data
member.summary: Gets the raw binary data of the attachment.

member.name: P:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.FileName
member.summary: Gets the optional filename of the attachment.

member.name: M:SmartWsdlKit.SoapAttachment.#ctor(System.String,System.Byte[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The raw binary payload of the attachment.
The MIME type of the content.
Optional filename associated with this payload.
